reviews.text: Did not give the correct order.  When we called they said “there’s nothing we can do about it”
Food is good, cooked in timely manner, could be a bit cleaner in the sitting area

Good portion, decent Chinese food- fair prices. The lady was nice and food came out quick.
Would eat here again.
ordered for pick up and it was less expensive than i thought it would be , very nice large servings , good taste , and pleasant customer service.

recentPosts.caption:
thanks to @visityorkcountysc for the feature in their most recent destination guide. pick up a copy to find out what else is happening in york county. 

weekend dinner special: coffee rubbed bone-in 12oz pork chops in collaboration with our friends at @rockhillcoffee 

serving these chops with neese’s sausage dirty rice, charred pineapple salsa, grilled wild ramps, and rock hill coffee-molasses bbq sauce.

lunch 11:30-3
dinner 5-9
bar til 10
cheesesteaks, chili-slaw dogs, bratwurst, and loaded steak nachos tonight for beach bash right out front of @elkavetavern 🌭🤘🤠👍💯

our pastrami reuben—house smoked corned beef, sauerkraut, 1000 russian islands dressing, melted swiss, toasted rye. the perfect compliment to your st paddy’s weekend. 

our kitchen will be open 11:30-9 tomorrow for rock hill’s st. patrick’s day festival. the bar’s pouring guiness til 10. 

our new hot dog cart (@cibicibidogcart ) will be located outside the tavern on black st serving custom dogs, cheesesteaks, and loaded nachos. 

guiness and smithwick’s available at the cart as well.

have a beautiful weekend.
psa: we’ll be open for dinner service on tuesdays starting next week, feb 4.

six months. 

unreal. what a fuckin trip. i should’ve probably made a fancy reel or something. 

this first six months could not have gone better. 

sure, there’ve been plenty of challenges, a couple (maybe several) mental breakdowns, and a hell of a lot of long days, but you all have showed up week after week. 

you’ve made it all worth it.

thank you, rock hill. thank you to our incredible staff—the best of the best. thank you to everyone who’s played a role in making this possible.

our goal is to deliver the best customer experience we can, and we’ll continue to do whatever it takes to make that happen. 

looking forward to many more half years. hope to see you soon.
we’re so close you can taste it…tomorrow. see you for lunch in the am.

LAST WEEKEND AT HOPPIN’!

Many thanks to the @hoppinrh crew for hosting us during our last six months of service.

We’d love to see you this weekend if you’ve got the time. Otherwise, we’ll see you on the other side at @elkavetavern 

✌️

this is where it started.

two driven (and pretty damn naive) cooks, a big blue truck, and a funny name. we had no clue what we were in for. 

the past six years have been some of the most challenging and rewarding of our lives. it’s been nothing short of a wild ride.

so this is one of those bitter sweet moments.

sunday june 23rd will be our final day on the truck as we prepare to open @elkavetavern

as always, we’re incredibly thankful for all the love and support. we could not have gotten here without it. 

we can’t wait to see you at the tavern.

We’re getting closer, everybody. 

Send us an email at elkavetavern@gmail.com if you’re interested in joining our team.

We still have open positions available for cooks, servers, bartenders, and hosts.

Please include a resume or list of references, as well as the position you’re seeking.

TACO TUESDAY 🌮🌮🌮

5-9pm at @hoppinrh 👍

this is where it started.

two driven (and pretty damn naive) cooks, a big blue truck, and a funny name. we had no clue what we were in for. 

the past six years have been some of the most challenging and rewarding of our lives. it’s been nothing short of a wild ride.

so this is one of those bitter sweet moments.

sunday june 23rd will be our final day on the truck as we prepare to open @elkavetavern

as always, we’re incredibly thankful for all the love and support. we could not have gotten here without it. 

we can’t wait to see you at the tavern.

TACO TUESDAY 🌮🌮🌮

5-9pm at @hoppinrh 👍

Happy One Year Anniversary to our friends at @hoppinrh 🥳🍾🍻🎉

We’ll be celebrating all day 12-3/4-9pm 🍔

FRIDAY 🍔🍟🍻

We’re open 12-3/4-9pm at @hoppinrh 👍

Have a great weekend 😁
THURSDAY at @hoppinrh 5-9pm 🍻

Still rollin’ with these mojo pork tacos with the fresh pico and jalapeño crema 👍

Highly recommend 🤠

Come and see us 5-9pm at @hoppinrh 🍻

JUICY MOJO PORK TACOS 🤤

Mojo marinated and braised, served the freshest of pico and charred jalapeño crème…for Taco Tuesday of course 🌮🌮🌮

Catch us this evening and thru the week at @hoppinrh 🍻

Tue 5-9pm
Wed 5-9pm
Thur 5-9pm
Fri 12-3/4-9pm
Sat 12-3/4-9pm
Sun 12-3/4-7pm
SUNDAY 12-3/4-7PM @hoppinrh 🍻

BLACKENED SALMON BL(NO T)O 
🐟🥓🥬❌🍅❌🧅

It’s got that charred jalapeño mayo on it 😋

Only have a handful so come n get em ☺️

Open 12-3/4-9pm at @hoppinrh 🍻

Open for lunch and dinner today and thru the weekend at @hoppinrh 🍔🍻

Friday 12-3/4-9pm
Saturday 12-3/4-9pm
Sunday 12-3/4-7pm

recentPosts.caption:
Psssst!!! 

We want you to join our super secret society! 
You’ll get coffee perks, in store perks, better rewards and more! 

Interested? Check out the link below to join! 
https://cdmercantile.com/merc-society/

Ever need catering for an event? Look no further! We’ve catered parties, weddings, showers and more! 

Call us or stop by to learn more!

Need Mother’s Day Gift Ideas?

Check out our gift guide for all your needs! 

We’re open til 7, stop by! 

#mothersday #flowers #diy #candles #coffee

A classic on our menu, the bacon egg and cheese! This version includes avocado for an extra savory bite! 

We love our breakfast menu! Stop by and try it!

Warmer days means wine out on the patio! 

Burro Alley is beautiful in the spring and summer, so grab a glass and enjoy the sun! Bring a friend along too! 

We’re open til 7, stop by!

We love the Greek drinks but here’s why you should give Mykonos, our Greek frappe, a try.

#greek #frappe #drinks #coffeeshop

THE SANTORINI

A lovely rose lemonade refresher, topped with cold foam! Making it the perfect sweet treat and cold drink. 

Try it or create your own refresher any day of the week.

We might be biased, but if you’re looking for good coffee, head our way….

#rockhill #coffeeshop #local

Come relax with some coffee or a bite to eat. (Or come try the new liquid death flavor we got in)

We’re open til 7

Everyone wish Logan the happiest of birthdays! He’s a jack of all trades, between events and cafe! A proud husband and a dog dad to Penny (who was originally one of the adoptable dogs who came into the cafe) But that’s not all, he shares a birthday with Arielle, another incredible member of our crew! It’s a double feature today! But they do get their own posts because of course. 

If you see Logan today, wish him the happiest of birthdays (and Arielle too!)

Psssst!!! 

We want you to join our super secret society! 
You’ll get coffee perks, in store perks, better rewards and more! 

Interested? Check out the link below to join! 
https://cdmercantile.com/merc-society/

Ever need catering for an event? Look no further! We’ve catered parties, weddings, showers and more! 

Call us or stop by to learn more!

A classic on our menu, the bacon egg and cheese! This version includes avocado for an extra savory bite! 

We love our breakfast menu! Stop by and try it!

Warmer days means wine out on the patio! 

Burro Alley is beautiful in the spring and summer, so grab a glass and enjoy the sun! Bring a friend along too! 

We’re open til 7, stop by!

We love the Greek drinks but here’s why you should give Mykonos, our Greek frappe, a try.

#greek #frappe #drinks #coffeeshop

THE SANTORINI

A lovely rose lemonade refresher, topped with cold foam! Making it the perfect sweet treat and cold drink. 

Try it or create your own refresher any day of the week.

We might be biased, but if you’re looking for good coffee, head our way….

#rockhill #coffeeshop #local

Come relax with some coffee or a bite to eat. (Or come try the new liquid death flavor we got in)

We’re open til 7

Everyone wish Arielle the happiest of birthdays! Arielle can do it all within the cafe, but most often you’ll see her serving up delicious sandwiches, pastries and more! A lover of Warped Tour and all things alternative, she’s also a birthday twin to Logan, who’s part of the Merc fam! It’s a double feature of course!

If you see Arielle, wish her the happiest of birthdays (same with Logan)

We’ve got a special for come see me fest starting today! 

Leap Frog Juice is an orange juice, lime jello and sprite refresher topped with edible glitter making it perfect for warm days (like today) 

Stop by and come try it!

recentPosts.caption: If you haven’t tried the pepperoni roll… wyd 👀
Wednesdays = JV Poker League at Rock Hill Brewing ♠️🍻 #rockhillbrewing #pov #freepoker *no real money is involved at our poker games*
busy Friday night #pov

Surprise music night at Rock Hill Brewing! JT Ackerman was booked last minute and will be on stage tonight from 7–9:30 PM. Grab a beer, grab a seat, and come enjoy some unexpected live music.
@jt.ack

Pre-Thanksgiving party tonight, Wednesday, Nov 26th! 🍻🔥
DB Cooper hits the stage 7–9:30, and at 8 PM we’re pulling TWO winners — the Rock Hill Brewing Engel Cooler Giveaway and That Grass’s giveaway.
Winner announcements will be live in person and on IG right here at @rockhillbrewingco 
Let’s kick off the holiday weekend the right way! 🦃✨ @thatgrassco

Week 12 is STACKED.
🐅 Clemson Friday night
🐓 Gamecocks Saturday at 12
Beer’s cold. Screens are in. See you here 🍻
Back on the college football grind💪 Come watch your favorite teams face off in our spacious brewery 🍻
Autumn Ember Marzen is now available in 6 packs! $12 until supplies last 🍻

🏓🍻 Tuesday nights = Locals Night at Rock Hill Brewing! From 6–8pm, residents of The Exchange, The Anderson, 139 Main, and Easley Apartments get $1 off RHBC beers + an extended happy hour food menu.
Come sip, smash, and show off your ping pong skills 🎶🍺#rockhillbrewing
Come out tonight 9-11:30 to celebrate Martha Dipastena ‘s BDay🍻
Commonwealth Divide is back at Rock Hill Brewing tomorrow night from 6–9pm! Come grab a beer, a pizza, and kick off your evening with some live music on stage!
Your Friday night plans are set 🍻 Kris Atom is playing live at RHBC this Friday from 7–9:30 PM. Cold beer, wood-fired pizza, and live music on stage.
Tonight 7-9:30!!!
Surprise music night at Rock Hill Brewing! JT Ackerman was booked last minute and will be on stage tonight from 7–9:30 PM. Grab a beer, grab a seat, and come enjoy some unexpected live music.

notes: Reputation is based on Google rating and review volume.
Social presence uses verified social profiles, recent post volume, post recency, and lightweight engagement signals.
Opportunity is higher when reputation is strong but social presence is still weak or missing.
No social profile found is treated as a marketing opportunity rather than a data failure.
Strong reputation plus strong social presence lowers immediate opportunity while improving public presence.
